self_report.viz_verdict: Shading the integrand (2x - 3x^3) - c from 0 to the second intersection shows the net signed area is ≈ 0.152 for c=2/9 (region B dominates) but ≈ 0 for c=4/9, so equal areas require c=4/9, not 2/9.
self_report.notes: The equal-area condition reduces to c·x_2 = x_2^2 - (3/4)x_2^4 combined with c = 2x_2 - 3x_2^3, yielding x_2 = 2/3 and c = 4/9; the picture confirms c=2/9 leaves a large positive residual.
